title: Context Assembly, Trust Labels, Token Budgets, Truncation, and Compaction · Program Brief: Compaction Regression
summary: The agent appends everything, places untrusted text beside system instructions, trims oldest messages blindly, trusts summaries, and cannot detect lost constraints after compaction. Predict authority, model and API behavior, state, tool effects, budgets, privacy, safety, accessibility, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the compaction regression increment in budgeted provenance-aware context builder. Learners progress through prediction,…
objectives: Test pre- and post-compaction decisions on changed goals, permissions, failures, tool calls, citations, and adversarial instructions.
Create structured summaries with source references, retained decisions, rejected alternatives, open questions, limits, and uncertainty without hidden-reasoning claims.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-ai-agent-python cumulative safe evaluated AI agent portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python interaction, tool, policy, state, memory,
evaluation, telemetry, and recovery models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only.
Provider APIs, Gemini models, native google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, credentials,
host files, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, cost, privacy review,
and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentPolicy:
    stakeholder_task_id: str
    allowed_tool_names: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_steps: int = 12
    maximum_tool_calls: int = 8
    approval_required_for_writes: bool = True


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentEvidence:
    revision: str
    model_config_digest: str
    policy_digest: str
    evaluation_digest: str
    recovery_drill_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Safe evaluated Python AI agent portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Worked focus: agentpy-compaction-regression — Test pre- and post-compaction decisions on changed goals, permissions, failures, tool calls, citations, and adversarial instructions.
# Evidence: agentpy-worked-agentpy-context-assembly-compaction-4
# Competency: agentpy-worked-agentpy-context-assembly-compaction-4.
# Case 1655: a controlled support-operations rehearsal.
# Operating constraint: telemetry and memory must remain tenant-isolated, minimized, redacted, and attributable.
# Changed case: change one eval case, rubric, model version, token price, rate limit, or latency distribution and rerun release gates.
def worked_agentpy_context_assembly_compaction_4(candidate_tokens: int = 18000, admitted_tokens: int = 12000, token_budget: int = 14000, trust_labeled_items: int = 42, unlabeled_items: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked4 = "worked4-4dekrow-1655"
    assert evidence_variant_worked4
    evidence_axes_worked4 = (
        "authorityworked4",
        "interaction1655",
        "tool4dekrow",
        "stateworked41655",
        "evaluation1655worked4",
        "recovery4dekrow1655",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked4)) == 6
    if candidate_tokens < 1 or admitted_tokens < 0:
        return False, admitted_tokens, "context-count"
    if admitted_tokens > token_budget:
        return False, admitted_tokens, "context-budget"
    if trust_labeled_items < 1 or unlabeled_items > 0:
        return False, unlabeled_items, "trust-label-gap"
    if candidate_tokens < admitted_tokens:
        return False, candidate_tokens, "context-accounting"
    assert admitted_tokens <= token_budget and unlabeled_items == 0
    return True, admitted_tokens, "bounded-context-assembly"

content.code:
# Evidence: agentpy-compaction-regression-vlqq7q
# Competency: agentpy-compaction-regression.
# Case 2777: a controlled support-operations rehearsal.
# Operating constraint: telemetry and memory must remain tenant-isolated, minimized, redacted, and attributable.
# Changed case: change one eval case, rubric, model version, token price, rate limit, or latency distribution and rerun release gates.
def evidence_agentpy_compaction_regression_vlqq7q(candidate_tokens: int = 18000, admitted_tokens: int = 12000, token_budget: int = 14000, trust_labeled_items: int = 42, unlabeled_items: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_vlqq7q = "vlqq7q-q7qqlv-2777"
    assert evidence_variant_vlqq7q
    evidence_axes_vlqq7q = (
        "authorityvlqq7q",
        "interaction2777",
        "toolq7qqlv",
        "statevlqq7q2777",
        "evaluation2777vlqq7q",
        "recoveryq7qqlv2777",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_vlqq7q)) == 6
    if candidate_tokens < 1 or admitted_tokens < 0:
        return False, admitted_tokens, "context-count"
    if admitted_tokens > token_budget:
        return False, admitted_tokens, "context-budget"
    if trust_labeled_items < 1 or unlabeled_items > 0:
        return False, unlabeled_items, "trust-label-gap"
    if candidate_tokens < admitted_tokens:
        return False, candidate_tokens, "context-accounting"
    assert admitted_tokens <= token_budget and unlabeled_items == 0
    return True, admitted_tokens, "bounded-context-assembly"
